properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every secret, every shame Every fear, every pain Live inside the dark But that's who we are We are children of the day

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So wake up sleeper Lift your head We were meant for more than this Fight the shadows, conquer death Make the most of time we have left

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are the light of the world We are the city on the hill We are the light of the world We gotta, we gotta We gotta let the light shine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let the light shine Let the light shine

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We are called to spread the news Tell the world the simple truth Jesus came to save There's freedom in his name So let it all breakthrough

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We are the light, we are the light We are the light To let your light shine brighter

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We are the light, we are the light We are the light, Jesus

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We are the light, we are the light We are the light We will lift you high and Shine, shine, shine

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We gotta shine, we gotta shine Let the light shine Let the light shine
